templates.title: Your streak is bleeding out
templates.body: Day {streak} ends in a few hours. One log keeps the chain alive.

templates.title: {streak} days. Don't let tonight be the one.
templates.body: Open RPLife and log anything — even a sip of water counts.

templates.title: The chamber is quiet. Are you?
templates.body: You haven't logged today. Your streak ends at midnight.

templates.title: The road bends ahead
templates.body: This week's encounter is waiting. Step in when you're ready.

templates.title: Something is on the road tonight
templates.body: You have an encounter to face. Don't go in unprepared — log first.

templates.title: The smoke hasn't lifted
templates.body: Your encounter has been waiting. The village notices.

templates.title: Bandits on the Greyhollow road
templates.body: Three of them. Travelers turn back here. You shouldn't.

templates.title: The chamber beneath the well
templates.body: The finale waits. Whatever you've trained for — bring it.

templates.title: Three quests, no takers
templates.body: Today's quests are still on the board. Pick one before noon.

templates.title: The hard one is worth the most
templates.body: Today's Hard quest is open. Finish it before evening for the best haul.

templates.title: Quests still pending
templates.body: You haven't picked anything up today. The simplest one takes 5 minutes.

templates.title: Two days dark
templates.body: Your hero is still standing. Log one thing and we pick up where you left off.

templates.title: The village asks after you
templates.body: It's been a week. Open RPLife — your streak resets, but your story doesn't.

templates.title: Greyhollow is waiting
templates.body: You left mid-season. Whatever happens beneath the well doesn't happen without you.

templates.title: The forest holds its breath
templates.body: Greyhollow's second week — the wolf hasn't shown itself yet. What you do today matters.

templates.title: A merchant came in the night
templates.body: Week 3 of your season. Today's choices set up the finale.

templates.title: Strangers on the road
templates.body: Your season closed. Word is traveling. Keep your habits sharp.

templates.title: Day {streak}. The hard part is done.
templates.body: A week is the threshold. Past this, the streak holds itself — log today and prove it.

templates.title: {streak} days. People notice this.
templates.body: Most never get here. Log today — same as always.

templates.title: Rest is part of the path
templates.body: You're on a rest day. No quests today — just notice how you feel.

templates.title: Your vitality runs low
templates.body: Sleep, hydration, or a quiet hour — your hero can recover tonight if you do.

templates.title: Dawn over Greyhollow
templates.body: A new day. What will the chronicle say about it?

templates.title: Already moving
templates.body: You logged this morning. Stack one more before noon — small things compound.

templates.title: Day {streak} of the chronicle
templates.body: Open RPLife. The day is yours to write.

templates.title: Log your deeds
templates.body: Before the day closes — what did you build today?

templates.title: Anything else for the chronicle?
templates.body: You've already logged today. One more entry isn't required — but it's there if you want it.

templates.title: Today is unwritten
templates.body: No entries yet. Even a one-line log keeps the day on the record.
